summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of V4 Landing Page Improvements Sprint. All 17 features tested and verified. Fixed one minor bug (duration showing '8 weeks weeks' instead of '8 weeks').
critical_code_review_comments: All V4 landing page improvements implemented correctly
Base background color (#FAFAFA) is consistent across the page
TWO container styles used: standard card (#FFFFFF) + highlighted card
Tier tabs with micro-labels working correctly
Sticky CTA simplified to just price + button as required
context_for_next_testing_agent: V4 Landing Page improvements fully tested. All features working correctly. Key test selectors: tier-tab-focussed/supported/comprehensive, tier-summary-card, start-journey-btn, sticky-cta-bar, faq-item-{n}. Login with any email and set localStorage 'niro_onboarding_completed'='true' to skip onboarding.

one_base_background_color.details: Base background is #FAFAFA (rgb(249, 250, 251)) across entire page

personalized_greeting.details: Hero shows 'Hi {userName}, here are the paths you can choose for your journey'

tier_tabs_micro_labels.details: Focussed='Quick clarity', Supported='Full support', Comprehensive='Deep confidence'

supported_recommended_badge.details: Supported tier shows 'Recommended' badge on tab and tier card

2x2_package_summary_grid.details: Grid shows Duration, Consultation, Follow-ups, Chat correctly

refund_guarantee_placement.details: Refund guarantee appears AFTER summary section as subtle trust strip

outcomes_no_colored_backgrounds.details: Outcomes section uses text + spacing only, no colored backgrounds

outcomes_grouped.details: Outcomes grouped into Clarity, Timeline, Support blocks

journey_unfold_section.details: 'How will your journey unfold?' section with 4-step timeline present

step_4_coming_soon.details: Step 4 shows 'Optional add-ons - Coming soon' (grayed out)

addons_coming_soon_pill.details: Add-ons cards show 'Coming soon' pill, NO 'Add to journey' button

sticky_cta_simplified.details: Sticky CTA shows only: price (left) + 'Start my journey' button (right)

sticky_cta_no_extras.details: Sticky CTA does NOT have: Recommended tag, weeks, package name, secure payments, refund text

why_niro_unlimited_followups.details: 'Why Niro' section includes 'Unlimited follow-ups till clarity' bullet

faqs_objection_killers.details: FAQs include: 'When will first consult happen?', 'Is chat unlimited?', 'What happens after I pay?', '7-day refund', 'Experts verified?'

razorpay_checkout_flow.details: Checkout screen loads correctly with Razorpay payment option

bug_fixed.issue: Duration was showing '8 weeks weeks' instead of '8 weeks'
bug_fixed.root_cause: tierData.duration was being overwritten by spread operator from tierFeatures which contained '8 weeks' string, then code appended 'weeks' again
bug_fixed.fix: Changed tierData to use 'durationWeeks' (numeric) instead of 'duration' to avoid conflict with spread
